summary: Comprehensive mobile (390px) + email auth audit. Backend auth APIs all pass (9/9). REACH Assessment full flow works on mobile. Portal login modal works. Critical bug fixed: urlMap not passed to LessonView causing crash. Compliance Library has mobile overflow due to minmax(540px, 1fr) grid. Bundle page has slight overflow (412px scrollWidth).

ui_bugs.issue: Product grids use 'repeat(auto-fit, minmax(540px, 1fr))' — product cards are 489px wide on 390px viewport, causing horizontal overflow. Button 'GET THIS — $37' extends 489px wide beyond viewport. No responsive class to override in media queries.
Slight horizontal overflow on mobile: scrollWidth=412px on 390px viewport
Navigates to '/ground-0' (non-existent route) - carried over from iteration_65
Button text still shows 'INITIATE GROUND 0 →' - carried over from iteration_65

issues: Email input not visible on first load (may be gated behind scroll or requires interaction to reveal)

bugs_fixed.fix: Added urlMap as prop to LessonView (was defined in parent state but not passed down). This caused ReferenceError crash when clicking BEGIN GROUND 0 in portal.

action_items: ComplianceLibraryPage.jsx lines 546, 560: Change minmax(540px, 1fr) to minmax(min(540px, 100%), 1fr) or add responsive media query to stack cards on mobile
BundleSalesPage: Find and fix element causing 412px scrollWidth on mobile
HeroSection.jsx (214), FinalCTASection.jsx (86), Ground0ExplainerSection.jsx (119): Update button text from 'INITIATE GROUND 0 →' to 'Take the REACH Diagnostic →'
critical_code_review_comments: Ground0LessonPlayer.jsx: urlMap state was defined in parent but never passed to LessonView child - caused ReferenceError crash on lesson load. FIXED.
ComplianceLibraryPage: minmax(540px, 1fr) in grid definitions breaks mobile layout - should use min(540px, 100%) or responsive override classes

success_rate.frontend: 75% (mobile mostly works, 2 overflow issues, article portal banner broken route)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 1) urlMap bug in Ground0LessonPlayer is FIXED. 2) Compliance Library mobile overflow still needs fixing (minmax(540px,1fr) grid). 3) BundleSalesPage 412px scrollWidth on mobile. 4) ArticlePortalBanner '/ground-0' broken route from iteration_65 still not fixed. 5) Button text 'INITIATE GROUND 0 →' in 3 components still not updated.
rca of the issue: Ground0LessonPlayer: urlMap defined as useState in parent Ground0LessonPlayer component (line 191) but LessonView (a separate function component at line 538) references urlMap directly in JSX at lines 584/647 without receiving it as a prop. React function components have no access to sibling/parent state unless explicitly passed as props. Fix: add urlMap to LessonView destructured props and pass urlMap={urlMap} at the call site.
